body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-3960", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "A critical remote code execution vulnerability exists in the unauthenticated REST API endpoint /99/ImportSQLTable in H2O-3 version 3.46.0.9 and prior. The vulnerability arises due to insufficient security controls in the parameter blacklist mechanism, which only targets MySQL JDBC driver-specific dangerous parameters. An attacker can bypass these controls by switching the JDBC URL protocol to jdbc:postgresql: and exploiting PostgreSQL JDBC driver-specific parameters such as socketFactory and socketFactoryArg. This allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code on the H2O-3 server with the privileges of the H2O-3 process. The issue is resolved in version 3.46.0.10.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00938, "percentile": 0.56516}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qmcv-hh7c-3m56", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T20:15:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qmcv-hh7c-3m56", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qmcv-hh7c-3m56"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-3960"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T10:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-04-23T12:31:34Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3960", "https://github.com/h2oai/h2o-3/commit/b9ae2d3c5220db2dc53753357a783e590364d044", "https://huntr.com/bounties/6954fe04-b905-453f-8c53-205ac8377e0d", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qmcv-hh7c-3m56"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/h2oai/h2o-3", "summary": "H2O-3 is Vulnerable to Code Injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T20:15:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qmcv-hh7c-3m56", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.46.0.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "ai.h2o:h2o-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.46.0.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
